places.name: Suoi Tien Cultural Theme Park
places.description: Have fun at the world's first Buddhist waterslide park.

places.name: Cu Chi Tunnels
places.description: A nightmare for the claustrophobic lies hidden in Southeast Asia.

places.name: The Venerable Thich Quảng Đức Monument
places.description: A memorial to the monk who set himself on fire to protest the persecution of Buddhists in Vietnam.

places.name: War Remnants Museum
places.description: Artifacts and memories from the Vietnam war, located in a place that experienced it first hand.

places.name: Saigon Central Post Office
places.description: This French colonial post office is arguably the grandest in all of Southeast Asia.

places.name: Nghia An Hoi Quan Pagoda
places.description: One of the oldest temples in Ho Chi Minh City, dedicated to a deified Chinese military leader.

places.name: Notre-Dame Cathedral Basilica of Saigon
places.description: Witnesses claim the Virgin Mary statue outside the church once mysteriously shed a single tear.

places.name: Hue Cafe Roastery
places.description: Order your coffee crowned with salted whipped cream or blended with coconut and ice.

places.name: Bún Riêu Gánh
places.description: This crab paste noodle soup specialist has been doling out its namesake dish for more than four decades.

places.name: Cơm Tấm Nguyễn Văn Cừ
places.description: Vietnam’s everyman “broken rice” dish is given one major upgrade at this humble institution.
